title: Project in Software Engineering
summary: Worked in a software development team over roughly three months using Scrum in a course built around agile delivery. The team worked in sprints, held daily standups, rotated responsibilities, and delivered strong results, earning the highest grade in the course.
responsibilities: worked as part of a cross-functional development team in a Scrum-based workflow
participated in sprint planning, daily standups, reviews, and retrospectives
rotated into the Scrum Master role and helped lead the team through sprint execution
supported team coordination, communication, and delivery throughout the project period

title: Independent Software Projects
summary: Built a portfolio of technically ambitious software projects independently, with a strong focus on backend architecture, interactive frontend systems, and full-stack product development. These projects include realtime collaboration, security scanning workflows, AI-assisted features, and 3D web applications.
responsibilities: designed and built full-stack projects from concept through implementation
worked across frontend development, backend APIs, data modeling, and deployment setup
explored technically challenging areas such as realtime synchronization, queue processing, and grounded AI integration
treated portfolio projects as complete systems with attention to architecture, usability, and product polish
